summary: Added minimal continuity anchors at the chapter entrance and close so the scene handoff from the prior dawn filing and the lead-in to Leela's next defense-focused morning read more cleanly without changing chapter beats.
edits: Linked the opening scene back to the prior chapter by marking the group as back upstairs after the basement filing.
Specified that the weakened grievance was sent at dawn to preserve the immediate handoff from chapter 13.
Added a brief image of Leela's untouched defense folder at the end to bridge toward the next chapter's meeting-prep opening.
